settings.heading: Your biology isn't one-size-fits-all. Your supplements shouldn't be either.
settings.text: At BaseCode Health, we build supplements informed by biological diversity research. The supplement industry ignores the fact that biology differs from person to person. We do not. Origin is our first product — and it will not be the last.

settings.quote: Finally, a supplement that considers my biology. I noticed a difference within the first week.

settings.quote: As someone from a South Asian background, this is the first time I feel like a supplement was made with me in mind.

settings.question: What is Origin?
settings.answer: Origin is the first ethnobiotic — a probiotic informed by biological diversity research. 40 billion CFU, 4 targeted strains, MAKTREK Bi-Pass delivery, FOS prebiotic. 60 veggie capsules per bottle (30-day supply).

settings.question: How is Origin different from other probiotics?
settings.answer: Most probiotics use generic strains for an average person. Origin's strains are selected based on the HELIUS study (2,084 subjects, 6 ethnic groups). MAKTREK acid-protection ensures bacteria arrive alive. FOS prebiotic feeds them on arrival.

settings.question: How do I take Origin?
settings.answer: Take 2 capsules daily with water. Morning or evening, with or without food. Each bottle is a 30-day supply.

settings.question: How much does Origin cost?
settings.answer: $34/month with a subscription (15% off). $40 for a one-time purchase. Free shipping on all subscriptions. Cancel anytime.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee. If Origin doesn't work for you, email hello@basecodehealth.com for a full refund. No questions asked.
